home.asenoTitle: Software Engineering for a Better Healthcare
home.firstLine: Our mission is to transform healthcare through innovative and proven software solutions. By using state-of-the-art technologies such as artificial intelligence, big data and cloud computing, we aim to improve the efficiency and quality of healthcare to create sustainable value for patients, medical staff and healthcare facilities.
home.identificationQuestion: Would you like to take your software to the next level?
home.identificationFirstLine: We analyze your existing IT landscape and provide concrete recommendations for action for a strategically sustainable software architecture that enables you to digitize your processes piece by piece and easily integrate innovative, decision-supporting modules.

about.values-firstLine: We are your first point of contact if you want a future-oriented and flexible software landscape in your healthcare facility.
about.value-list-title-2: We rely on future-oriented and flexible IT solutions
about.value-list-descrition-2: Our mission is to align your IT strategically and intelligently. With software products that will provide you with great added value in the long term. And across the board. Because your software usually doesn't just consist of a product that is super performant. But where, in what context, do you use which product optimally for what. And how easily they interact with each other and can be expanded to include further functionalities. We are the best contact when it comes to designing your IT landscape in a strategically clever and forward-looking manner.
about.value-list-descrition-3: We develop, test and most importantly: we always get your customer feedback! Thanks to our agile and transparent way of working, you can track the progress and quality of our work at any time. Through regular communication and open processes, misunderstandings are minimized, your feedback is quickly integrated and our mutual collaboration is improved. This is guaranteed to lead to a result that will satisfy you to the highest degree.
about.value-list-descrition-1: We at ASENO are health-conscious IT experts and our hearts beat for healthcare. We are aware that health is the most valuable asset we have. And with our IT expertise, we want to ensure that more future-proof and flexible IT systems find their way into the healthcare sector. So that better health care can be achieved for all of us.
about.competencies-firstLine: We bring exactly the right expertise for future-oriented and flexible software.

services.firstLine: ASENO helps all businesses not only reach, but exceed their goals. Our experience helps us lay out a strategy that perfectly fits our clients. This collaboration is essential for the successful transition from strategy, to plan, to action. Learn about some of our past projects below, and get in touch to see what we can do for you.
services.secondLine: Wir analysieren ihre bestehenden Software-Landschaft und geben konkrete Handlungsempfehlungen für eine strategisch, nachhaltige Software-Architektur, die es ihnen ermöglicht ihre Prozesse Stück für Stück zu digitalisieren und innovative, entscheidungsunterstützende Module leicht zu integrieren.
services.service-plan-firstLine: With our simple but very efficient five-step plan, we take you from the very beginning to the final step.
services.service-plan-step-1-description: We offer a free webinar. With an hour, ASENO engineers will figure out what our customers' goals, needs and pain points are. If ASENO can help, we will discuss different options based on our experience. At the end of our webinar, the ASENO engineers will provide initial feedback!
services.service-plan-step-2-description: ASENO creates a concept with the aim of providing an offer with a cost estimate. Here we offer a day workshop to exactly understand the requirements of our customers. Based on the workshop, we create a concept with a business and technical focus. We offer solutions in sizes S, M, L and XL. The customer can start with S and later switch to L or XL. The result is a concept! with an existing schedule to complete the project. All costs are transparent and fixed.
services.service-plan-step-3-description: Developing, Testing & most important - Customer Feedback-Loop! ASENO initializes a customer-specific project. Resources, data pipelines and a special team with the required know-how is formed to fulfill the project on time & best quality possible. Agile development. Every 2 weeks ASENO presents the progress of the current work. The customer can submit feedback and change requests. Test & communication with the customer are provided on a weekly basis.
services.service-plan-step-4-description: Delivery the final product including documentation and know-how transfer to the customer. Our team takes care that the customer is satisfied with the final product / work.
services.service-plan-step-5-description: We do not leave our customers on its own after we finished the good work. From time to time a software needs to be updated, customers wish more functionalities or changes. ASENO offers a support and additional service if needed/ required.
services.expertice-description-1: Data is one of the most important resources of modern organizations. More and more companies are using data for their processes and decisions to achieve their individual business goals. One of the most important question is which products do your customers need and how can you provide new services by using the data you have currently available? Could you combine these data with some additional information to offer even more personalized services according to the known preferences of each customer or do you need to rethink your business for the digital age? ASENO has more than 15 years of experience on the German IT market and will be happy to answer your questions. Please schedule a free meeting with us! In the past few years, BigData products for the analysis, processing and visualization of internal data have been successfully introduced in the productive environment.
services.expertice-description-3: Many organizations and departments are working on, or planning new digital products. The IT infrastructure and the appropriate software are crucial for every success. Do not reinvent the wheel! On premise, Cloud or Hybrid infrastructure? Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP), Customer Relationship Management (CRM) and many more excellent software products are out there available for you and every day smart engineers are working hard to make them even better. However, there is no silver bullet! which one is best for your business and how to update, extend, migrate or build it from scratch? ASENO has more than 15 years experience on building and running data intensive applications - both on private and public cloud. We are happy to analyze your business needs, share best practices and help you introduce the most appropriate solution into your enterprise.

team.title: Our Team
team.paragraph: Meet our team! Expertise is not merely a possession but a tool wielded with finesse, shaping the digital healthcare future with every innovation they conceive.
team.valentin-paragraph: Valentin is our Chief Technology Officer (CTO) and the driving force behind the technological innovations of our IT company. With a diploma in computer science, extensive experience as a software architect and his enthusiasm for innovative technologies, he brings in-depth technical know-how to our team. Known as an icebreaker and innovative thinker, Valentin is at the forefront of developing groundbreaking solutions. His vision is to ensure the best possible medical care for the people around him through advanced and proven technologies.
team.mira-paragraph: As a qualified bioinformatician and having worked as a software developer for many years, Mira not only brings extensive technical knowledge, but also a deep passion for innovation and progress in healthcare. As a trained yoga teacher and nature-loving person, she would like to see a more comprehensive approach to healthcare that combines modern technology with holistic methods.  We are proud to have her on our team and, together with her as head of business development, we will positively shape the future of healthcare.

customers.title: Some of Our Past and Current Projects
customers.bmw-content: BMW AG is a German multinational corporation which produces luxury vehicles and motorcycles. From 2012 to 2014, the architects and developers at ASENO were responsible for the concept, specification, implementation, testing and launch / release of the BMW AG online configurator. The website, based on portal technology, including backend components (CRM, Author and Publisher, Web Analytics) was launched very successfully in several countries: bmw.de, bmw.nl, bmw.at, bmw.co.uk.
customers.ing-content: ING (or ING DiBa) is one of the biggest and fast-growing online banks in Germany. ASENO engineers very successfully supported the internal software team at ING DiBa in setting up, analyzing, developing and launching a customer context platform. The platform - based on BigData and SpeedData technology (realtime / near time data analysis and push notifications) went live in 2017 and is still used extensively for customer notifications and fraud detection, among other things.
customers.ba-content: The IT system house of the Federal Employment Agency (BA) is responsible for the strategic alignment, further development and security of several internal software products. ASENO is currently advising BA on business-critical infrastructure components, container platforms and cloud-native applications. In the past few years, BigData products for the analysis, processing and visualization of internal data have been successfully introduced in the productive environment.
